title: Dilomilis nodosa
taxonomy: Dilomilis nodosa is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This classification places it among the orchids, a diverse and widespread group of flowering plants. The genus Dilomilis is further divided into several species, with Dilomilis nodosa being one of them. The species is native to tropical and subtropical regions, where it grows in shaded areas and woodland environments. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Dilomilis nodosa is a type of flowering plant characterized by its unique and often exotic appearance.
